color_requirements: blue_ratio > 0.20 AND blue_ratio > brown_ratio AND blue_ratio > green_ratio AND dark_ratio < 0.40
description: Strong water dominance. Relative comparison ensures water is visually primary. Prevents confusion with wet soil or shadow.

color_requirements: brown_ratio > 0.32 AND dust_ratio > 0.20 AND green_ratio < 0.22 AND blue_ratio < 0.08 AND gray_ratio < 0.30
description: Fresh exposed soil + dust with low vegetation. Gray suppression avoids confusion with construction.

color_requirements: dust_ratio > 0.30 AND gray_ratio > 0.28 AND red_ratio > 0.06 AND brown_ratio < 0.30
description: Dust + concrete + human activity indicators (red). Brown capped to avoid landslide confusion.

color_requirements: dark_ratio > 0.30 AND gray_ratio > 0.20 AND brown_ratio BETWEEN 0.10 AND 0.25 AND blue_ratio < 0.08 AND dust_ratio < 0.25
description: Asphalt failure with moderate soil exposure. Dust cap avoids construction confusion; blue cap avoids wet road misclassification.

color_requirements: gray_ratio > 0.24 AND brown_ratio > 0.20 AND green_ratio < 0.22 AND blue_ratio < 0.10 AND dust_ratio < 0.28
description: Mixed artificial + organic debris. Controlled dust avoids confusion with construction.

color_requirements: green_ratio > 0.45 AND green_ratio > gray_ratio AND green_ratio > brown_ratio AND blue_ratio < 0.12
description: Vegetation must be dominant. Relative rule avoids mixed-scene false positives.
examples: overgrown plants, blocked paths, encroaching trees

color_requirements: dark_ratio > 0.28 AND gray_ratio > 0.32 AND red_ratio < 0.08 AND green_ratio < 0.18 AND blue_ratio < 0.10
description: Linear dark objects in concrete-heavy scene. Suppresses vegetation and activity noise.
examples: fallen poles, exposed wires, damaged infrastructure
